prompt: A captivating oil painting of a thunderstorm over a wheat field, with swirling dark clouds and lightning sharply illuminating golden stalks below.
prompt_refined: Generate an oil painting of a dramatic thunderstorm. Ominous, swirling dark clouds gather in the upper sky above a golden wheat field. Jagged lightning bolts intensely illuminate the vast expanse of wheat stalks stretching into the midground and foreground.
